headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Parker Hannifin, Raises Price Target to $1141
summary: Citigroup  analyst Andrew Kaplowitz   maintains Parker Hannifin (NYSE:PH) with a Buy and raises the price target from $1137 to $1141.

headline: Donaldson Benefits From Business Strength Amid Headwinds
summary: DCI rides strength across segments and acquisitions to drive growth, but weak on-road demand and rising costs pose near-term challenges.
